# Seasonal Application Data Review Request

Use the repository's `season-data-reviewer` custom agent to investigate the candidate official-source difference appended below.

Compare the changed official evidence with the active annual JSON fields represented by the application. Open a pull request only if a modeled value needs to change. In that pull request, update the JSON and any supporting retained official document together, update the accepted source-check date, refresh the reviewed monitor baseline, and run the required verification.

If the changed source is presentation-only, an equivalent relocation while the app's stored official destination still works, PDF metadata only, or otherwise does not alter modeled application data, do not change repository files and do not open a pull request. An unavailable or publisher-replaced source URL used by the app is modeled data and should be corrected in a pull request. Record any no-update conclusion in this issue so the same candidate key is not delegated again.

---
